song.title: With Praise and Thanksgiving
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1)With praise and thanksgiving There stands a great throng In the presence of Jesus And sing this new song.
[C] Chorus Unto Him Who hath loved us And washed us from sin Unto Him be the glory forever! Amen!
[V2] 2) All these once were sinners, Defiled in His sight, Now arrayed in pure garments, In praise they unite.
[V3] 3) He maketh the rebel A priest and a king, He hath bought us, And taught us this new song to sing.
[V4] 4) How helpless and hopeless We sinners had been, If He never had loved us Till cleansed from our sin.
[V5] 5) Aloud in His praises Our voices shall ring, So that others, believing, This new song shall sing.
song.author: Arthuer T. Pierson
